title: 3M Bair Hugger 775 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the 3M Bair Hugger 775 Series patient warming system, including filter inspection, temperature calibration, over-temperature testing, electrical safety documentation, and CMMS copy text.
interval: Operating temperature calibration and over-temperature detection system test every 6 months or 500 hours of use; air filter replacement every 12 months or 500 hours of use.

title: Cardinal Health Kendall SCD 700 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Cardinal Health Kendall SCD 700 Series sequential compression device controller, including filter inspection, Basic Functional Test, battery check, and electrical safety documentation.

title: Welch Allyn Connex 6000 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Welch Allyn Connex 6000 Series vital signs monitor, including manufacturer-listed intervals, functional verification, electrical safety testing, pass/fail criteria, and CMMS copy text.
interval: NIBP annually; SpO2 annually; SpHb annually; SureTemp Plus annually; Braun ThermoScan PRO 6000 annually; CO2 annually or by hour interval if equipped; battery replacement at 300 charge cycles; housing air vents cleaned annually.

title: Cardinal Health Kangaroo ePump - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Cardinal Health Kangaroo ePump enteral feeding pump, including annual re-certification, flow accuracy check, battery condition check, cleaning review, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Performance re-certification at least once per year, or any time improper performance is suspected. Cleaning as needed / facility-defined. Battery replacement has no fixed interval listed; replace if battery life degrades.

title: Hillrom VersaCare - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Hillrom VersaCare hospital bed, including annual PM inspection, leakage current testing, battery interval check, bed function testing, siderail checks, caster and brake inspection, and optional scale or IntelliDrive checks.
interval: Annual PM and testing recommended. Batteries should be replaced every 3 years.

title: Medtronic Valleylab FT10 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Medtronic Valleylab FT10 electrosurgical unit, including visual inspection, self-test, audio verification, RF output checks, REM testing, cross-coupling verification, leakage testing, and ground continuity documentation.
interval: Annual periodic safety check, or as directed by troubleshooting/service requirements.

title: ZOLL R Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the ZOLL R Series defibrillator, including annual maintenance checkout, leakage current testing, defibrillator output testing, sync testing, and option-specific checks.
interval: Every 12 months. NIBP volume leak test and NIBP transducer calibration test, if installed, annually or every 10,000 readings, whichever comes first.

title: Medtronic Valleylab Force FX - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Medtronic Valleylab Force FX electrosurgical generator, including inspection, self-test, REM verification, output confirmation, leakage testing, RF leakage checks, and CMMS documentation.
